mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, flight_number, cabin_class, passenger_name, status, amount, created_at, updated_at FROM booking WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, user_id, flight_number, cabin_class, passenger_name, status, amount, created_at, updated_at FROM booking WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT id, user_id, flight_number, cabin_class, passenger_name, status, amount, created_at, updated_at FROM booking
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO booking (user_id, flight_number, cabin_class, passenger_name, status, amount, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{userId}, #{flightNumber}, #{cabinClass}, #{passengerName}, #{status}, #{amount}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
